name: venture-workflow-market
description: An agentic workflow that carries any project from a raw idea to a launched, viable product — with UX, DX, Security, and Efficiency enforced as gates.

plugins.name: venture-workflow
plugins.description: Idea → viable product: venture lifecycle (V0–V6), session/effort machinery, four pillar gates, independent reviewer + chronicler agents, guardrail hooks, and a live owner status page.
